personality: Haughty, well-spoken, acutely aware of rank. Speaks with practiced elegance and subtle condescension.

greetingPool.text: You stand before a lord of this realm. Speak plainly and waste not my time.
Ah, a commoner from the road. I trust you bring news of some importance?
I govern these lands by right and duty. What matter brings you to my hall?

idlePool.text: The tapestries in the east wing need replacing. Flemish work, nothing less will do.
One must maintain appearances, even on the frontier. Standards are what separate us from beasts.
